# Generated by exon. Do not edit manually.

cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.30)

set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD 23)
set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD_REQUIRED ON)
set(CMAKE_EXPERIMENTAL_CXX_IMPORT_STD "451f2fe2-a8a2-47c3-bc32-94786d8fc91b")
set(CMAKE_CXX_MODULE_STD ON)
project(workspace LANGUAGES CXX)

set(CMAKE_EXPORT_COMPILE_COMMANDS ON)

if(MSVC)
    add_compile_options(/W4 /wd4996 /utf-8)
    add_compile_definitions(_CRT_SECURE_NO_WARNINGS)
endif()

set(EXON_ENABLE_TEST_TARGETS OFF)

add_subdirectory("libs/foundation" ${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}/members/foundation)
add_subdirectory("libs/greeting" ${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}/members/greeting)
add_subdirectory("apps/hello" ${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}/members/hello)
add_subdirectory("apps/report" ${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}/members/report)
add_subdirectory("apps/inspect" ${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}/members/inspect)
